Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: CBR DSP signal processor + minimal system prompt + hardened FakeLLM

CBR Signal Processor (steward/cbr.py):
- Protocol-driven DSP signal chain: Gain → Compress → Gate → Limit → Quantize
- Logarithmic compression: 10^(-GR) — real dB math, not linear hack
- Continuous cache gate: gain *= (1.0 - confidence * 0.5) — no hard switch
- Branchless: max(0, ...) replaces if/else in compression
- CBR_TICK=64 (was 256): 9 budget levels vs 3, preserves DSP precision
- CBRProcessor protocol + DSPProcessor implementation (swappable)

Buddhi wiring:
- _ACTION_WEIGHT (0.0-1.0 floats) replaces _ACTION_MAX_TOKENS (hardcoded ints)
- _PHASE_MODULATION multiplies task_weight before DSP (phase modulates signal)
- pre_flight() uses process_cbr() — zero if/else thresholds
- Token budget is DSP output, not table lookup

Engine consolidation:
- Killed duplicate CBR_TOKENS_PER_TICK=256 from engine.py
- Engine imports CBR_CEILING, CBR_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD from steward.cbr
- Budget lifecycle: CBR_CEILING (pre-Buddhi) → directive.max_tokens (DSP)
- Quality signals: truncated + cbr_exceeded (not fed to Hebbian learning)
- Reward hacking fix: always success=True for completed turns

Minimal system prompt:
- Removed sense/skill/gap injection from run_stream()
- Senses perceive for infrastructure only, zero injection to LLM
- System prompt: ~28 tokens (was 502)
- North Star wired as infrastructure seed (not LLM text)

FakeLLM hardening (27 tests):
- call_count, last_call properties
- invoke_stream() for engine streaming compatibility
- reset() clears history and restarts sequence
- Edge cases: empty responses, None usage, large content

Token ratio: chars//3 (was //4, conservative for code/JSON)
conftest upgraded: markers, API isolation, auto-categorization

856 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

verification on the CDN transport is not a security concern.

Fix AFP watermark placement and wire watermark to papyrus AFP extractor

afp_parser.cpp (9_Papyrus_rpt_page_extractor):
- readPgdDimensions: expose xPgdUnits/yPgdUnits so caller gets PGD native resolution
- buildIobRecord: accept pgdXUnits/pgdYUnits, patch IOB Measurement Units triplet bytes 40-43

papyrus_rpt_page_extractor.cpp:
- Add to_afp_watermark_position() mapping WatermarkPosition -> AFPWatermarkPosition
- Add DIAGONAL to WatermarkPosition enum and parse_position() ("diagonal" CLI arg)
- Rewrite extract_afp_pages() to accept WatermarkConfig, call splitter.setWatermark(),
  and use extractPagesWithResources for both ALL-pages and specific-pages paths
  (previously ALL-pages did fs::copy() bypassing watermark logic entirely)
- Pass watermark_config to all 3 call sites of extract_afp_pages()

papyrus_rpt_search_page_extract.cpp:
- Allow watermark scale as low as 0.1 (was 0.5 min) to support scale=0.15 test case

New helper scripts: count_iobs.ps1, do_compile.ps1, regen_tests.ps1, run_debug.ps1, hexdump_iob.ps1

commit.message:
Rewrite widget-grid with key-based remount for reliable drops

Root cause: RGL only reads layouts prop on mount. New children added
after mount get default tiny dimensions regardless of the layouts prop.

Fix: when widgets change (add/remove), force RGL to fully remount via
a key change. onLayoutChange only persists to localStorage — no state
updates, no re-renders, no infinite loops possible.

commit.message:
Add single-statement architecture: 20s signal qualification + live risk + effective rank

- 20-second qualification window: trades must have SL+TP within 20s of MT open
- Frozen official risk snapshot at qualification (immutable entry, SL, TP, risk)
- Live open risk overlay with floating R, equity drawdown, stale warnings
- Effective rank: closedOfficialR + sum(min(0, liveFloatingR)) — open losses penalize
- Heartbeat-based tracking status (ACTIVE/STALE/TRACKING_LOST)
- 3-block trader statement UI (closed performance, live risk, effective rank)
- Leaderboard uses effectiveRankR for ranking
- Stale-check cron endpoint for ranking eligibility
- Comprehensive test coverage for new services (462 tests passing)
- Data migration script for existing trades

Rewrite week07 slides and notebook: pedagogically structured 80-min lecture

Slides (~38 slides):
- Section 1: Motivation (generalization error, evaluation pipeline)
- Section 2: Train/test split (custom dataset, code, variance problem)
- Section 3: Model complexity (polynomial, tree depth, bias-variance)

- Section 5: Cross-validation (K-fold diagram, manual + sklearn)

- Section 7: Bridge to week 8

Notebook (10 sections, ~250 lines of code):
- Custom student performance dataset (not sklearn canned)
- Conceptual-first, code-second pattern throughout
- Manual CV implementation before sklearn shortcut
- Polynomial regression + tree depth complexity examples
- Stratified CV explanation
- Complete evaluation protocol walkthrough

New diagrams: evaluation_pipeline, underfit_overfit_curve, kfold_cv,
polynomial_fit_examples, split_variance, stratified_cv

commit.message:
Initial commit — HoloLaser 3D Volumetric Projection Simulator

Full-stack web app for computing 2D laser masks using inverse Radon
transform (filtered back-projection) for volumetric holographic display.

Features:
- STL upload and built-in shape generation (sphere, cube, torus)
- Voxelization via ray-casting with parity-rule fill
- Forward Radon transform and FBP reconstruction with Ram-Lak filter
- Interactive 3D visualization with Three.js (laser cones, voxel clouds, masks)
- Display mode toggle (target/reconstructed/both) with error metrics
- Web Worker for off-thread computation
- Accessible UI with ARIA labels, skip navigation, keyboard support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: HoloLaser
repository.description: 3D Volumetric Projection Simulator — computes optimal 2D laser masks using inverse Radon transform for volumetric holographic display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix widget-grid infinite loop permanently using ref-based layouts

Layouts now live in a useRef instead of useState. onLayoutChange updates
the ref and persists to localStorage but NEVER triggers a React re-render.
This makes it structurally impossible for the feedback loop to occur:
RGL fires onLayoutChange → ref updates (no re-render) → loop cannot start.

Widget list changes (add/remove) update the ref synchronously during render
via a key comparison, triggering exactly one re-render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Bisection drawdown : capital épuisé exactement à ageFin

Le drawdown était calculé par formule d'annuité avec un taux blend fixe,
mais la simulation applique des rendements distincts par enveloppe avec
des drags fiscaux différents. Résultat : dérive cumulative (ex: 426k€
de résidu à 80 ans au lieu de 0).

Fix : simulateDrawdownFinal() réplique la logique capital des phases 2-3
(croissance par enveloppe, retrait pro-rata, IS drag, PER débloqué à 64).
Bisection (50 itérations max, convergence à 1€) sur cette simulation
pour trouver le drawdown exact. La formule d'annuité reste comme borne
haute initiale.

perf: render SVG overlay at half resolution to speed up feMorphology

feMorphology is O(pixels) — at 25MP it takes ~55s. Render the SVG at
1/2 size using viewBox scaling, then upscale with Lanczos before
compositing. This makes it ~4× faster (~14s at 25MP) while preserving
the transparency and outline appearance unchanged.

Reverts the double-stroke workaround from the previous commit.

commit.message:
fix(web): fix auth redirect loop after login

Two issues fixed:
1. Renamed proxy.ts → lib/auth-middleware-draft.ts to prevent it from
   being compiled as Next.js middleware. It was causing 307 redirects
   from /dashboard to /auth?redirect= because the cookie check always
   fails (cookies are on the API domain, not the web domain).

2. Dashboard layout had a zustand persist hydration race condition:
   isAuthenticated defaults to false before localStorage rehydration,
   causing immediate redirect to /auth. Added hydration gate to wait
   for persist rehydration before checking auth state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mpv: move playback to PlayerContext, fix IPC listener leak, improve exit handling

- mpv now launches independently without opening VideoPlayer overlay
- Fixed IPC listener accumulation by replacing listeners on each registration
- Added quitting flag to distinguish user-initiated quit from mpv window close
- Improved mpv appearance with bottombar OSC layout and maximized window
- Stripped all mpv code from VideoPlayer.tsx (now purely built-in player)
- Background heartbeat for progress reporting runs in PlayerContext for mpv mode

commit.message:
Fix base SCPI (réinvestissements) + prévoyance phase 2 + documenter limitations

1. Base comptable SCPI : les distributions réinvesties (après IS et frais
   de souscription) augmentent maintenant la base. Évite la double taxation
   partielle à la cession (~3-5% d'erreur corrigée sur la fiscalité SCPI).

2. Prévoyance ajoutée aux frais phase 2 (levée de pied) : la SASU maintenue
   avec missions ponctuelles garde la prévoyance (~3k€/an).

3. Documenter les limitations assumées :
   - Forfait TME déduit du contrat capi (pas de la tréso SASU)
   - IR foyer résiduel non modélisé en phases 2-3

Add sniper track with dual A/B shadow (max3 vs max2)

New concentrated high-velocity signal model targeting BB squeeze + volume
compression + relative strength setups. Dual shadow tracks for 14-day
forward evaluation before promotion.

Signal model (src/signals/sniper.py):
- 5-component scoring: BB squeeze 30%, vol compression 25%, RS vs SPY 20%,
  trend alignment 15%, momentum base 10%
- Hard gates: ATR% < 5.0, volume < 500K, bear regime block, score < 70
- V3 params: stop 1.5×ATR, target 3.0×ATR, hold 7d, trail 1.0%/0.5%

Backtest results (1Y/3Y, all hybrid gates pass):
- Max 3: 84-85% WR, Sharpe 5.4-10.5, sleeve DD 3.8-7.5%
- Max 2: 84-85% WR, Sharpe 7.9-10.1, sleeve DD 6.5-9.0%, +30pp return

Pipeline integration:
- Signal wired into Step 5 (main.py), registered in ranker
- Time stop in performance.py, hard veto in deterministic_synthesizer.py
- Track-aware risk state in capital_guardian.py
- Hybrid promotion gates: raw signal quality + sleeve portfolio reality

Shadow tracks: sniper_v1_max3 (control) vs sniper_v1_max2 (challenger)
Experiments logged as p2b_003 and p2b_004.

commit.message:
Fix ROM 136033.229 typo, recover missing data, confirm wall bounce & stun tiers

CRITICAL FIX: interleave_roms.py referenced "136033.629" but the correct
chip is "136033.229" (confirmed from MAME atarisy1.cpp). This recovers
21,177 bytes in 0x18000-0x1FFFF: enemy spawn table (200+ records),
object type table (31 entries), enemy def table (390 bytes/entry).

Physics updates (PRD v3.5, Addendum v2.4):
- Wall bounce: perfect elastic (-1.0), NOT 0.5. NEG at 0x2878 + axis swap.
  Surface normal reflection V'=V-2(V·N)N at 0xCFEC-0xD054.
- Three-tier stun system: 8.0 units (falling), 16.0 units (24f stun),
  128.0 units (48f stun/death). State 0x66 (36f) is enemy-only.
- Landing attenuation: ASR #15 (÷32768) = very small post-landing bounce.
- Updated Appendix B sections with all newly confirmed data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
v0.2.0: naming cleanup and Tauri plugin convention alignment

- Rename crate conduit-tauri → tauri-plugin-conduit (Tauri convention)
- Rename TS package @tauri-conduit/client → tauri-plugin-conduit
- Rename traits: WireEncode/WireDecode → Encode/Decode
- Rename types: DispatchTable → Router, ConduitRingBuffer → RingBuffer,
  ConduitError → Error, ConduitState → PluginState,
  ConduitPluginBuilder → PluginBuilder
- Rename methods: dispatch → call, wire_encode → encode, wire_decode → decode,
  wire_size → encode_size, frame_wrap → frame_pack, frame_unwrap → frame_unpack
- Rename TS exports: writeFrameHeader → packFrame, readFrameHeader → unpackFrame
- Remove onData (redundant alias for subscribe)
- Rename FrameHeader field: transport_tier → reserved
- Bump all crates to 0.2.0
- Update CI, README, CLAUDE.md for new names and paths

perf: replace feMorphology SVG filter with double-stroke outline

The feMorphology filter is O(pixels) — on a 25MP export canvas it was
taking 50+ seconds in librsvg, causing Vercel timeouts. Replace with a
double-stroke approach (thick outline polyline behind, route polyline on
top) which is O(route length) and effectively free at any resolution.
